demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged care facility; nursing staff present at the visit

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My daughter gave me these strong herbal pills for my joints today, and now my heart feels funny and I'm terrified they are mixing with my blood thinners.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Took some herbal supplements a relative brought in and now feels palpitations and dizziness, and is frightened they will react badly with the regular heart and blood-thinner medications.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening, shortly after taking the herbal pills
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours, since taking the supplements
symptom_narrative.character: a funny fluttering feeling in the chest with some lightheadedness, on a background of feeling very anxious
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very frightened and worked up, though able to sit and talk
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest fluttering and a general feeling of being dizzy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on after the pills and has been easing while resting and being reassured
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting quietly and being reassured; the supplements being taken away
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: worrying about what the pills might do
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling anxious and a bit dizzy; no chest pain, no shortness of breath
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: independent within the facility, currently resting in a chair

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: irregular heartbeat (atrial fibrillation), which the doctors say is under control
past_medical_history.how_managed: takes a blood thinner and a heart tablet every day

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: strong herbal joint pills my daughter brought in (unlabelled bottles)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in an aged care facility; a daughter brought in several bottles of unlabelled herbal supplements for her joints; nursing staff are present and involved in her care

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried and seeking reassurance about a feared drug interaction

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: reported by on-site facility nursing staff, not independently verified over the telehealth link
single reading relayed by facility nursing staff

objective_data_offered.value: appears anxious, sitting resting in a chair, alert and conversing
three unlabelled bottles of herbal supplements on the bedside table brought in by the daughter
